name: Stir-Fried Chicken and Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Fresh broccoli, sliced thin crosswise
1 cup Sliced Green Onion, white and green parts included
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken into bite-size pieces.
2. Sprinkle ginger and pepper over the chicken.
3. Heat oil in a large fry pan or wok to high temperature.
4. Add chicken and stir-fry for 3 minutes, or until browned.
5. Push chicken to one side of the pan and add broccoli and onion.
6. Stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
7. Mix together 3/4 cup broth, salt, and sugar in a bowl.
8. Stir the mixture into the fry pan. Reduce heat to medium-high, cover,
and cook for 2 minutes.
9. Add cornstarch to the remaining 2 tablespoons of chicken broth
and stir until smooth.
10. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the fry pan and cook for 1 minute.
11. Remove from heat and stir in Parmesan cheese.
12. Sprinkle with whole wheat croutons. Serves 8.
Whole Wheat Croutons:
1. Cut 4 slices of whole wheat bread into 1-inch cubes.
2. Mix the bread cubes, 2 tablespoons melted butter, 1 tablespoon chopped parsley,
and 1/2 teaspoon garlic salt in a bowl.
3. Spread the mixture into one layer and toast at 300 degrees for 20 minutes,
or until crisp.
